summary: Bulk merge of PRs #2491 and #2494-#2499 that advanced matching across stage and library code. The headline change promoted src/melee/gr/grheal.c from NonMatching to Matching in configure.py after adding matched stage code/data, while also improving or matching grzebesroute lighting/data, lbmemory allocator/ARAM transfer routines, lbheap heap setup, lbsnap snapshot functions, lbarq ARQ state handling, and a small lbcardnew snapshot-entry codegen cleanup. decomp.dev reported 22 new matches, including grHeal_8021F180, lbMemory_8001564C, grHeal_8021F70C, multiple grheal/grzebesroute data sections, several lbsnap functions, and lbHeap_80015F3C.

key_files.reason: Changed melee/gr/grheal.c from Object(NonMatching, ...) to Object(Matching, ...).
Matched grHeal_8021F180 and grHeal_8021F70C, recovered grheal data/rodata/sdata/sbss layout, added typed data blocks and stage-data wrappers.
Added grHeal_UnkData and extern grHeal_804D6AF0[2] declaration used by grheal.c.
Recovered route stage data, rodata, sdata, sdata2 and implemented near-matching grZebesRoute_8020B548 lighting setup.
Reworked allocator structures, recovered global allocator symbol, matched lbMemory_8001564C and improved lbMemory_80015320/fn_80015184.
Clarified Handle::x8_hi comment as arena high bound for heap handles and allocation size for child handles.
Introduced heap descriptor/offset-view helpers and refactored heap initialization/destruction to improve matching.
Replaced magic ARQ state indices with lbArqState enum values, added dont_inline and PAD_STACK matching tactics.
Added lbArqState enum, typed node state, and replaced opaque lbArqGlobal padding with lbArqNode nodes[10].
Adjusted stack padding and expression shapes to match several snapshot routines.
Minor signature/type cleanup associated with lbsnap matching.
Removed local snapshot_entries alias and wrote through lb_80432A68.snapshot_entries directly for better codegen.

what_changed: Marked grheal.c as Matching in configure.py.
Implemented previously nonmatching grHeal_8021F180, including coin spawn position setup, next-player jobj lookup/reparenting, player model jobj setup, and mpJointSetCb1 callback registration.
Rewrote grHeal_8021F70C with explicit base/entry pointers and goto-shaped loop control to match the original character-id-to-frame search behavior.
Recovered grheal data layout using grHeal_UnkVec4, grHeal_DataBlock, grHeal_StageData, static asserts, explicit report/assert strings, and an sbss array grHeal_804D6AF0[2].
Implemented grZebesRoute_8020B548 as a light-object setup routine using HSD_LObj APIs, recovered route light-position data, GXColor constants, float constants, and stage OSReport/assert strings.
Changed grzebesroute gobj error reporting to use recovered data strings instead of direct __FILE__ string literals.
Added lbArqState enum and replaced raw state/list indices 0, 1, 2 with LB_ARQ_STATE_FREE, LB_ARQ_STATE_PENDING, and LB_ARQ_STATE_DONE.
Typed lbArqGlobal as lbArqNode nodes[10] plus list[3] instead of a large padding blob.
Reworked lbheap with named heap descriptor and offset-view structs plus inline reset/create/destroy helpers, correcting pointer/integer treatment of arena and ARAM bounds.
Reconstructed lbmemory allocator internals with MemEntry, LBMgr, Allocator fields, recovered assertion/report strings, and exported lbMemory_804318B0 as the allocator global.
Implemented lbMemory_8001564C initialization and lbMemory_80015320 memory move/compaction behavior, including HSD_DevComRequest for one address range path and OSAlarm chunked copy for another.
Adjusted lbsnap functions through PAD_STACK changes and code-shape rewrites to produce additional full matches.
Simplified lbcardnew snapshot-entry writes to use the global object directly, improving lb_8001B14C matching.
smart_moves: Used typed wrapper structs with STATIC_ASSERT sizes to encode data-section layout without losing symbol-level readability.
Recovered rodata/sdata strings as named globals and then routed OSReport/__assert calls through them, which helped data matching and avoided compiler-emitted literal placement differences.
Used an overlay/view trick in grHeal_8021EFEC: deriving StageCallbacks through a cast from grHeal_803E83B8 + 0x9C preserved the original packed data layout needed for matching.
In grheal, split a packed stage-data-plus-format-string blob into grHeal_StageData with an embedded StageData and adjacent report format, preserving layout while making access fields meaningful.
For lbarq, converted magic numeric states into an enum while keeping the exact list-index semantics, improving maintainability without sacrificing matching.
Applied #pragma dont_inline around small access/init routines and used PAD_STACK where needed, indicating deliberate compiler codegen control rather than purely semantic rewriting.
In lbheap, introduced small static inline helpers for repeated heap reset/create/destroy logic; this reduced duplicated code while still matching the target function shapes.
In lbmemory, retained low-level pointer arithmetic where the allocator layout demanded it, but replaced anonymous byte padding with named substructures where evidence was strong.
decomp_lessons: When matching data-heavy stage files, model adjacent arrays, strings, and StageData blocks as one or more exact-size structs; add STATIC_ASSERTs to guard against silent layout drift.
Do not assume every string literal can stay inline: original binaries often have report/assert format strings in .data/.rodata/.sdata, and calls may need to reference recovered symbols.
Enums can replace magic state values if they preserve exact underlying values and indexing behavior; this improves searchability and future review without changing codegen intent.
For stubborn loops, especially lookup-table scans, goto labels and explicit pointer increments may be necessary to mirror original control flow.
Global allocator/heap structs should be reconstructed incrementally: replace padding only when offsets, sizes, and access patterns are evidenced by diff and static asserts.
Stack-shape controls such as PAD_STACK and no-inline pragmas are legitimate matching tools, but should be localized to the functions that need them.
Sometimes a direct local alias hurts codegen; lbcardnew improved by writing through lb_80432A68.snapshot_entries directly instead of keeping a snapshot_entries local.
Header comments can carry useful uncertainty resolution: Handle::x8_hi was clarified as high bound for heap handles and size for child handles, preventing future misuse.
naming_conventions: Stage-local unknown structs used the file/function prefix plus descriptive suffixes, e.g. grHeal_UnkVec4, grHeal_DataBlock, grHeal_StageData, grZebesRoute_LightData.
Unresolved global symbols kept address-style names such as grHeal_803E83B8, grHeal_804D6AF0, grZe_Route_804DB920, and lbMemory_804318B0.
Recovered ARQ states used uppercase enum constants with subsystem prefix: LB_ARQ_STATE_FREE, LB_ARQ_STATE_PENDING, LB_ARQ_STATE_DONE.
Small-data and string labels in lbmemory retained address-label style names such as lbl_803BA2C0 and lbMemory_804D3788 when semantic names were not evidenced.
Stage route symbols used the existing grZe_Route_ prefix rather than spelling the full file prefix everywhere, matching local file convention.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Changed configure.py object status for grheal only after code/data reached full matching.
Used #pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on / #pragma pop around lbArq_80014ABC and lbMemory_8001564C.
Inserted or adjusted PAD_STACK calls in lbarq and lbsnap to tune stack frame/codegen.
Used STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(...)) for grHeal_DataBlock, grHeal_StageData, MemEntry, and lbMemory_804318B0 layout validation.
Used explicit casts through char* and struct overlay views to access packed data at original offsets.
Used goto-labeled loop structure in grHeal_8021F70C to match branch layout.
Recovered float constants with uppercase F suffixes and sdata2 symbols for grzebesroute lighting math.
Replaced direct string literals and __FILE__ use with recovered global string symbols in OSReport and __assert calls.

review_feedback.feedback: Reported GALE01 matched code improvement to 67.12% (+0.13%, +5172 bytes), linked code to 38.91% (+0.06%, +2312 bytes), matched data to 39.36% (+0.08%, +984 bytes), and linked data to 33.19% (+0.04%, +464 bytes).
Reported 22 new matches, including grHeal_8021F180, lbMemory_8001564C, grheal/grzebesroute data sections, grHeal_8021F70C, several lbsnap routines, fn_80015184, and lbHeap_80015F3C.

Reported six unmatched-item improvements, including grZebesRoute_8020B548 to 99.97%, lb_8001B14C to 98.77%, lbMemory_80015320 to 96.11%, lbHeap_80015900 to 96.48%, lbSnap_8001DA5C to 55.88%, and lbArq_80014BD0 to 96.55%.
No human review comments were present in the provided PR slice.

follow_up_queries: Find the individual source PRs #2491 and #2494-#2499 for per-author rationale and any review feedback hidden by this bulk merge.
Search for later cleanup of grHeal_DataBlock/grHeal_StageData to see whether the packed-data overlay survived or was replaced by stronger types.
Search for subsequent full match of grZebesRoute_8020B548, which was reported at 99.97% rather than 100%.
Search lbMemory_80015320 and lbHeap_80015900 in later PRs for final matching tactics after these partial improvements.
Search lbarq enum usage to verify LB_ARQ_STATE_* became the standard convention for ARQ list states.
